positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration featuring a group of various woodland creatures (fox, owl, badger, rabbit) engaged in a celebratory picnic under a massive, glowing moon. The style is modern vector illustration with strong, clean silhouettes and graphic linework, reminiscent of high-end children's book art. The color palette uses deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with warm highlights (golden yellow, burnt orange). Composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed for a circular or square cut print on apparel. Dramatic, soft volumetric lighting coming from the moon and stylized fireflies. Minimal background detail, focusing on the main subjects' forms and joy. Print-ready, seamless, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, poor quality, extra limbs, low contrast, bad anatomy, grainy, photographic, realistic photography, disfigured, deformed
